title: Software Development Engineer in Test
description_raw:
The Division:
Jonas Premier Construction - a division of Constellation Software Inc. ᅡᆲ ̄ツ﾿ ̄テᄁ is the market-leading cloud-based integrated construction management solution, for mid-sized General Contractors, Design Builders and Land Developers. Constellation companies are leading developers of technology solutions for vertical markets in North America, Europe, and Australia. Jonas Software is the valued technology partner of over 8000 customers worldwide in 15 countries. Jonas is headquartered in Canada and operates offices in the United States, the United Kingdom, and the Caribbean.

The Position:
We are looking to hire a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET), with a strong background in Test Automation (using Selenium, C# & NUnit), as well as in Manual Testing, to work as part of the JPC R&D team to help ensure high quality and timely delivery of releases. Working out of the Contour Software Lahore office, the successful hire will collaborate with team members in the same office and those in Markham, Canada.

Qualifications & Skills:
  • University degree in Computer Science or a related discipline
  • 3-7 years of formal QA/Test Automation experience, working on customer-facing enterprise-level software solutions
  • Strong background in Test Automation using Selenium, Visual Studio/C# & NUnit
  • Extensive background in Test Documentation and Manual Testing
  • Ability to create Test Automation frameworks
  • Excellent command of English (written and verbal)
  • Experience working with Azure DevOps or Jenkins for creating pipelines
  • Experience with Microsoft SQL Server and/or Oracle with the ability to write complex SQL statements.
  • Strong familiarity with software lifecycle and quality assurance concepts, testing, approaches, and planning
  • Strong ability to understand business processes and logic
  • Ability to perform comfortably in a fast-paced, deadline-oriented agile work environment
  • Familiarity with the Construction Industry will be a plus
Responsibilities (not limited to the following):
  • Collaborate with testers, developers to create detailed, comprehensive, and well-structured test plans and test cases
  • Grow, Maintain and Enhance existing Test Automation Framework and Test Scripts to increase/extend automation coverage
  • Execute tests manually when required
  • Review requirements specifications and technical design documents to provide timely and meaningful feedback
  • Estimate, prioritize, plan, and coordinate testing activities
  • Design, develop and execute automation scripts on different releases/versions
  • Create concise, easily understandable defect reports
  • Coordinate/participate in meetings with the on-shore team on day to day basis and provide active feedback
  • Perform any other responsibilities assigned by the on-shore Managers
Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage ᅡᆲ ̄ツ﾿ ̄テᄁ Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit
  • Child Care Facility
  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games
  • Sporadic On-shore training opportunities
  • Friendly work environment
  • Leave Encashment

description: SUMMARY Constellation Softwares rapidly growing Perseus Operating Group (CSI) has an outstanding opportunity for an experienced Network En..
title: Network Engineer
description_raw:
SUMMARY
Constellation Software's rapidly growing Perseus Operating Group (CSI) has an outstanding opportunity for an experienced Network Engineer to help support the day-to-day operations, network security and design, and fielding of incidents as they come in, while adapting security standards and governance to the real-world challenges of a large-scale, multi-location, multi-business and multi-cultural environment.

The Position
The Network Engineer is responsible for ensuring network connectivity and security. This position will provide on-going technical service in network support, circuit support, routing support, security monitoring, routing and switching, VLAN support and infrastructure design for the Perseus Operating Group business needs.

JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES
Network Maintenance:
  • Create and maintain operational procedures and systems documentation for processes, networks, systems, and software.
  • Install and maintain network devices including firewalls, switches, wireless access points, SD-WAN, routers, circuits, gateways, etc.
  • Install server hardware and server-related peripheral devices.
  • Install and use network and server analysis and performance tools to improve overall reliability and throughput.
  • Participate in the design and review of new network environments and patching of these environments.
  • Evaluate, recommend, and implement new products to extend the reliability, responsiveness, and effective use of the network environment.
Security:
  • Assist in overall management of the firewalls, switches, circuits, and routing of the corporate wide area network.
  • Ensure high availability and performance of security and network environment.
  • Strong demonstrated knowledge on perimeter security like IDS/IPS, firewalls, web proxies, etc.
  • Extensive experience with VPN/IPSEC tunnels, both site-to-site and client-based.
Support:
  • Responsible for resolving any technical issues the business units may encounter in their normal course of business as a result of Constellation's WAN and LAN environments.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software problems.
  • Provide third-tier network support for the various businesses.
  • Daily recording and submitting of accurate timecards.
  • Adjust work schedule to accommodate business needs.
  • Other duties and projects as required by the company.
REQUIRED EXPERIENCE
  • B.S. degree in IT / CS / EE or equivalent with 3 years working experience maintaining a wide area network
  • Strong knowledge of network engineering.
  • Possess basic project management skills
  • Excellent English communication skills are essential. Must be able to give and receive correct information, explain difficult information in layman's terms and maintain a customer service attitude to all levels of users.
  • Experience working in Active Directory, including security groups and overall AD structure knowledge
  • Packet Capturing
  • OSI Model Understanding
  • Experience Configuring Network Infrastructure Hardware (Switches, Routers, Load Balancers)
  • Experience Deploying and Configuring Network Security Appliances (Firewalls, IPS's, Application Layer Gateways)
  • Solid understanding of networking technologies and protocols (IP, TCP, UDP, VLANS, OSPF, BGP, Static Routing, DNS)
  • Strong demonstrated knowledge on perimeter security like IDS/IPS, Firewalls, Web Proxies, etc.
  • Extensive experience with VPN/IPSEC tunnels, both site-to-site and client-based
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting routing issues, security rules, NAT, PAT, QOS, SSL decryption, URL filtering, threat detection, intrusion detection
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting Wireless networks
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting VOIP
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting QOS
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting VLANing, Spanning Tree, Guard Root, Trunking
  • Experienced with hardware builds, rack-mounting configuration and deployment
PREFERRED EXPERIENCE
  • 3+ years engineering experience or equivalent industry knowledge
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting Palo Alto Networks
  • Experience administrating, supporting and maintaining Solarwinds
  • Palo Alto, CCNA, Aruba, ClearPass, Dell certifications desirable
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting IP networking including firewalls, IP routing, IPSEC VPNs, MPLS, SDWAN and Wireless
  • Experience supporting and troubleshooting some or all of the following: Palo Alto, Cisco, Dell, Client/Aruba switch hardware, Aruba Wireless, ClearPass
  • Supporting and implementing a Wide Area Network with over 90+ locations
  • Azure, AWS, Google, or other cloud experience
  • Scripting skills (BASH, Python, Powershell) a plus
ADDITIONAL QUALIFICATIONS
  • Ability to work 8:00am-5:00pm ET time zone
  • Perform 24x7 advanced tier troubleshooting, including off-hour maintenance activities, problem resolution, and on-call troubleshooting efforts during data network outages
  • Must be able to sit at a computer workstation for extended time periods and fully utilize the PC monitor, keyboard, mouse, and required programs.
  • Able to present ideas in business-friendly and user-friendly language
  • Possess strong interpersonal and communication skills
  • Capable of writing documentation
  • Possess a keen attention to detail
  • Strong customer service orientation
  • Proven analytical and problem-solving abilities
  • Highly self-motivated and directed
  • Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a high-pressure environment
  • Experience working in a process-oriented, collaborative environment
Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage – Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit
  • Child Care Facility
  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games
  • Sporadic On-shore training opportunities
  • Friendly work environment
  • Leave Encashment

description: Job Role: We are looking for additional help on our technical team to monitor and maintain internal and customer systems...
title: DevOps Engineer
description_raw:
Job Role:
We are looking for additional help on our technical team to monitor and maintain internal and customer systems. Additionally, interaction with our internal staff solving user issues on a daily basis may be a significant part of this position. The role also calls for someone who can be available on a weekend day to install security updates once or twice a month. This will generally be a full time position working UK (GMT/BST) hours with the exception of weekend day that would be traded (i.e. one or two weeks of a month they might work Saturday and have Friday off or something similar). They will also be responsible for assisting in installing security updates in Docker container images and other maintenance tasks.

Required Skills and Experience:
  • Proven experience in infrastructure engineering with a strong emphasis on Linux and AWS Cloud.
  • Solid understanding of DevOps principles and practices, including experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI).
  • Proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash) for automation tasks.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills and the ability to resolve complex technical issues.
  • Excellent documentation skills with a keen attention to detail.
  • Experience with monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack).
  • Familiarity with networking concepts and security best practices.
  • Strong customer service orientation and the ability to support end users effectively.
  • Ability to work independently as well as part of a team.
  • Proactive mindset and propose innovative solutions when necessary
  • Familiarity with Microsoft Windows Server, Windows 10/11, Active Directory management

Desirable Qualifications:
  • Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Certified Kubernetes Administrator) are advantageous.
  • Experience with containerisation and orchestration tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Knowledge of infrastructure as code (IaC) tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible).
  • Knowledge of Google Workspace administration
  • Knowledge of Azure AD / Entra and Microsoft 365 environments.


Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage – Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit
  • Child Care Facility
  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games

description: Infotech is seeking a dedicated Software Quality Assurance Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate is a sharp and quick learn..
description_raw:
Infotech is seeking a dedicated Software Quality Assurance Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate is a sharp and quick learner with a strong foundation in software QA methodologies, tools, and processes. This role requires a deep understanding of quality assurance principles, hands-on experience writing complex SQL queries and test scripts, and familiarity with key frameworks such as CMMI. The candidate will play a pivotal part in ensuring the quality and reliability of our software products by executing thorough testing, including load, stress, and security testing. A strong grasp of TCP/IP protocol stack, web technologies, and secure API testing is essential to excel in this position. Experience with test automation tools and test management platforms like JIRA is highly valued. Excellent verbal and written communication skills, together with sharp analytical abilities and keen observational skills, are crucial to successfully identify issues and improve product quality. This position does not involve managing a team but offers an excellent opportunity for professional growth within a highly skilled QA environment.
Responsibilities
Develop, execute, and maintain complex test scripts and SQL queries to validate software functionality and performance.

Apply comprehensive knowledge of software QA methodologies, industry best practices, and company standards to enhance testing processes.

Use test management tools such as JIRA or Quality Center to document test cases, manage defects, and track testing progress efficiently.

Perform manual and automated testing, utilizing tools such as JMeter, QTP, Silk Test, and Selenium to ensure software stability under various conditions.

Conduct load, stress, and security testing to assess application resilience, identify bottlenecks, and detect potential vulnerabilities.

Evaluate web and web technologies in-depth, understanding the TCP/IP protocol stack to troubleshoot and analyze software behavior effectively.

Test secure APIs rigorously to ensure data integrity and security compliance across integrations.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand product requirements and translate them into detailed test plans and test cases.

Apply knowledge of CMMI framework to align testing practices with organizational quality goals and continuous improvement initiatives.

Analyze testing outcomes critically and document findings across all software releases, providing actionable feedback to development teams.

Employ keen observation and analytical skills to detect subtle defects and inconsistencies, ensuring comprehensive coverage and high-quality deliverables.

Stay current with emerging QA trends, tools, and technologies to continuously improve testing effectiveness and efficiency.

Participate actively in review meetings and contribute to improving the QA strategy, ensuring that all quality standards are consistently met.

Leverage prior experience with stock market trading systems where applicable to understand domain-specific requirements and risks.

Communicate clearly and professionally in verbal and written forms, facilitating smooth information flow throughout the project lifecycle.

description: THE DIVISION: ..
title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description_raw:
THE DIVISION:
Constellation1 , a division of Perseus (an operating group of Constellation Software Inc.) is the leading provider of truly integrated technology, media and data solutions to real estate franchisors, brokerages, agents and MLS organizations and associations. We're clear about what we want to do: Innovate in real estate. Not in pursuit of some larger business strategy, but in pursuit of making this industry – our industry – better. We don't just sell technology. We work closely with clients and partners to identify problems, develop solutions and uncover opportunities.

THE POSITION:
A Senior Cloud Engineer is responsible for helping to architect, design, and implement key features and components in our AWS mission-critical platform by building micro-services and designing serverless applications in AWS to support our real estate data business.
From a technical perspective, this role requires working with many of the major AWS offerings including services, such as Lambda, Step Functions, Kinesis, Dynamo, Redshift, Scaling EC2 and CloudWatc h as examples. An understanding of Serverless design patterns and how and when to implement auto-scaling to ensure optimal throughput is essential.
Aside from the architecture and design, a Sr. Cloud Engineer must be an AWS cloud evangelist who loves teaching, mentoring and growing the talent around him/her. A team leader who enjoys making the team around him or her better. Leads by example.
Lastly, at times this role will require someone to lead a project and small team for the sake of building or enhancing a particular product or feature. This means working on a new project from initiation, design, architecture, planning, estimating, tracking and helping others on the team see the vision and develop in unison as a cohesive team that delivers incremental customer usable features on-time.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:
  • Help oversee architecture of real estate data pipeline.
  • Develop pipeline components that are scalable, reliable and efficient.
  • Continual oversight of the overall architecture ensuring the overall system doesn't erode or become overly complex as time passes and features are added.
  • Perform Project and Team lead duties as needed for new core features.
  • Code reviews, mentoring and coaching teammates to understand and implement AWS best practices in line with an "AWS Well-Architected Framework” .
  • Provide feedback and constructive critiques resulting in optimum performance and system design .
  • Continual tracking of component and overall system performance by applying and automating application and performance best practice testing, monitoring and reporting.
  • P rovide input and recommendations on managing costs within our AWS infrastructure at micro and macro levels.
JOB QUALIFICATIONS
  • We are seeking a Sr. Cloud Engineer that has familiarity with AWS Serverless architectures and has 4+ years of systems engineering/administration experience with Elastic Search. Candidate must have experience which demonstrates an understanding software design as it relates to Elasticsearch or OpenSearch deployments, indexing and querying. Estimated 50/50 split between general AWS and Elastic Search development.
  • 5+ years of professional coding experience with 3+ years in cloud services.
  • Experience in major AWS event-driven, compute and database solutions, including but not limited to:
    • Lambda, OpenSearch, Step Functions, SQS, Dynamo, Aurora and/or RDS (candidates with experience in both NoSQL and relational are preferred)
  • C#/.Net Framework experience preferred.
  • Understanding of developing microservices in AWS.
  • Understanding of CI/CD principles.
  • 4+ years of experience with Elastic Stack cluster architecture, design and deployment.
  • 2+ years of working with and understanding software design as it relates to Elasticsearch deployments or distributed computing / system architecture.
  • Reporting and alerting tools such as Grafana, Kibana, Cloudwatch, Quicksight etc.
Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage – Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit
  • Child Care Facility
  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games
  • Sporadic On-shore training opportunities
  • Friendly work environment
  • Leave Encashment

description: Bytepeach is seeking an experienced Software Quality Assurance (SQA) Engineer with a minimum of five years of experience to join our dynamic..
description_raw:
Bytepeach is seeking an experienced Software Quality Assurance (SQA) Engineer with a minimum of five years of experience to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate excels in test automation and agile testing methodologies, ensuring the delivery of high-quality software products. This role involves hands-on testing activities and close collaboration with the development team to identify defects early and improve software performance. Although this position does not involve managing a team, the SQA Engineer will take ownership of the quality assurance processes and contribute to enhancing testing strategies.
Responsibilities
  • Develop and execute automated test scripts to validate software functionality and performance according to specifications.
  • Design and implement testing frameworks that support agile development practices and continuous integration pipelines.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to understand requirements and provide timely feedback on product quality.
  • Identify, document, and track software defects and work with development teams to ensure timely resolution.
  • Participate actively in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives to align testing efforts with project goals.
  • Analyze test results, generate detailed test reports, and recommend improvements for software quality and testing processes.
  • Maintain and update existing automation scripts to accommodate new features and changing requirements.
  • Ensure adherence to organizational quality standards and advocate for best practices in testing and quality assurance.
  • Contribute to continuous process improvement initiatives by sharing insights gained from testing activities.
  • Support the evaluation and adoption of new testing tools and technologies to enhance test coverage and efficiency.

description: We are seeking a skilled web application developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developi..
description_raw:
We are seeking a skilled web application developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high-quality web applications while collaborating closely with team members throughout the entire software development lifecycle. This role requires a detail-oriented professional who can contribute to project planning, execute effective unit testing, and ensure timely delivery of solutions that meet business requirements.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain robust web applications that align with project specifications and user needs.
- Create and execute comprehensive unit tests to ensure code quality and functionality.
- Collaborate with the team leader to accurately estimate project timelines and deliverables.
- Actively participate in all phases of the software development lifecycle, including requirements gathering, architecture design, coding, testing, and deployment.
- Work closely with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot and resolve software defects and performance issues.
- Continuously improve application performance and user experience through iterative development and feedback incorporation.

Required Qualifications

- Proven experience in web application development with a strong understanding of front-end and back-end technologies.
- Proficiency in writing effective unit tests to validate code functionality.
- Ability to work collaboratively within a team environment and communicate effectively with stakeholders.
- Solid understanding of the software development lifecycle and agile methodologies.
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
- Experience in estimating project timelines and managing deliverables alongside team leaders.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits

- Familiarity with modern web frameworks and tools that enhance development efficiency.
- Experience with deployment processes and continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.
- Opportunities for professional growth and skill development within a supportive team environment.
- Competitive compensation and benefits package tailored to attract and retain top talent.

This position offers the chance to contribute to meaningful projects in a collaborative setting, where innovation and quality are highly valued. If you are passionate about web development and eager to take on new challenges, we encourage you to apply.

description: BAJO Digital Ventures is partnering with a US-based venture capital fund-of-funds to recruit a talented professional to join their team. Thi..
description_raw:
BAJO Digital Ventures is partnering with a US-based venture capital fund-of-funds to recruit a talented professional to join their team. This firm manages a diverse portfolio that includes multiple fund families and co-investment vehicles, primarily focused on early-stage technology investments. The team, consisting of approximately 20 members, operates with a technology-first approach, developing proprietary internal systems that enhance the sourcing, analysis, and management of investments. This role offers a unique opportunity to work in a dynamic environment that blends venture capital expertise with innovative technology solutions.

Key Responsibilities
- Support the investment team in sourcing and evaluating early-stage technology fund opportunities and co-investments.
- Conduct thorough due diligence, including market research, financial analysis, and competitive landscape assessments.
- Assist in the development and maintenance of proprietary tools and systems to improve investment processes.
- Collaborate closely with portfolio companies and fund managers to monitor performance and provide ongoing support.
- Prepare detailed investment memos, presentations, and reports for internal and external stakeholders.
- Track industry trends and emerging technologies to inform investment strategies.
- Participate in meetings with fund managers, entrepreneurs, and other key stakeholders to gather insights and build relationships.

Required Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or a related field.
- Strong analytical skills with experience in financial modeling and data analysis.
- Familiarity with venture capital, private equity, or investment management is essential.
- Proficiency in using technology tools and platforms to support investment activities.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex information clearly.
- Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
- Demonstrated ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a collaborative team.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Advanced degree such as an MBA or relevant certifications (e.g., CFA) is a plus.
- Prior experience working within a venture capital fund-of-funds or in early-stage technology investing.
- Exposure to building or working with proprietary investment systems or software.
- Opportunity to work in a forward-thinking, technology-driven environment that values innovation.
- Collaborative culture with a small, focused team dedicated to leveraging technology for competitive advantage.
- Potential for professional growth and development within a fast-paced venture capital setting.

This position is ideal for candidates passionate about venture capital and technology, eager to contribute to a firm that combines deep industry knowledge with cutting-edge technological tools to drive investment success.

description: Samad Enterprises is seeking a skilled Software Engineer with a minimum of two years of professional experience to join our dynamic developm..
description_raw:
Samad Enterprises is seeking a skilled Software Engineer with a minimum of two years of professional experience to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate possesses a strong understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle and Agile Methodologies, and demonstrates expertise in Code Review, Unit Testing, and Continuous Integration. This role involves collaborating within a team environment and requires excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to deliver high-quality software solutions. The Software Engineer will work closely with cross-functional teams to design, develop, test, and maintain software applications that meet business needs. Additionally, the position involves managing a team of five professionals, fostering collaboration, and ensuring that project goals are met efficiently.
Responsibilities
  • Develop, test, and maintain software applications following the Software Development Life Cycle and Agile practices.
  • Participate in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives to ensure continuous improvement and delivery.
  • Perform thorough code reviews to maintain code quality and adherence to company standards.
  • Write and execute unit tests to identify and fix defects early in the development process.
  • Implement Continuous Integration pipelines to automate build, test, and deployment processes.
  • Collaborate with team members to analyze requirements, design solutions, and troubleshoot issues.
  • Lead and guide a team of five software professionals, providing technical direction and support.
  • Ensure that all software development activities meet project timelines and quality expectations.
  • Document software designs, coding standards, and test plans for reference and compliance purposes.
  • Communicate progress and challenges effectively with stakeholders and adapt to evolving project requirements.

description: The Division Dot.cy - We are a global leading provider of world-class software solutions, built on the powerful ecosystem of Microsoft ..
description_raw:
The Division
Dot.cy - We are a global leading provider of world-class software solutions, built on the powerful ecosystem of Microsoft Dynamics 365.

Since our foundation in 1999, we have served more than 200 clients in their digital transformation, improving their processes, products, and customer experiences.
The Position
We are looking for Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement Engineer who will participate in the development of our two products, dot.Ticketing ( www.dotticketing.com ) or dot.Hospitality ( www.dothospitality.com ). This position will entail working together with the rest of the development team of dot.Ticketing and dot.Hospitality which is distributed in Cyprus, Greece, and UAE. We will select which resource will work on which product depending on the interview results. Each resource will work on only 1 product.
The chosen individual will work out of the Contour Software Karachi/Lahore/Islamabad resource center office, as an extension of the division-based R&D department.
Roles and Responsibilities:
  • Extend Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement platform using MS Dynamics SDK and .NET Framework.
  • Use satellite products from the Dynamics 365 family to provide solutions to clients.
  • Design and develop robust, scalable, high performing, high-volume production applications with users across the globe.
  • Provide front-end Dynamics 365 development capabilities using known JavaScript Frameworks.
  • Follow Microsoft development standards and best practices.
  • Integrate Dynamics 365 with other systems and applications.
  • Perform unit testing prior to deploying solution on test environment for quality assurance.
  • Experience with MAUI and/or Xamarin technologies will be considered as an additional advantage.

Required Skills:
  • 5+ year experience on related stack.
  • Software development skills with 5+ years of experience using .NET framework and Dynamics 365 CE.
  • Technical proficiency in development of web services.
  • Hands on object-oriented development experience in a Microsoft stack development environment primarily using C# in Visual Studio.
  • Working experience in HTML5, CSS3, jQuery and with known JavaScript frameworks like AngularJS will be considered as an advantage.
  • Understanding of UI, cross-browser compatibility, general web functions and standards.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Good English knowledge, written and oral.

Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage – Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit
  • Child Care Facility
  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games
  • Sporadic On-shore training opportunities
  • Friendly work environment
  • Leave Encashment

We empower financial institutions to become leaders in digital transformation. As a globally recognized professional team, we collaborate with top-tier clients on innovative and exciting projects, fostering an environment where continuous learning and growth are part of the daily experience. Every contribution, whether through code, ideas, or teamwork, is valued and celebrated. We seek candidates who align with our core values, possess the necessary skills, and are passionate about shaping the digital future of finance alongside us.

Key Responsibilities
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and implement cutting-edge digital solutions for financial institutions.
- Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code while adhering to best practices and coding standards.
- Participate actively in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring high-quality deliverables.

- Contribute to the overall improvement of development processes and team collaboration.
- Communicate effectively with clients and internal stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver solutions that meet business objectives.

- Proven experience in software development within the financial services sector or a related industry.
- Strong proficiency in relevant programming languages and frameworks.
- Solid understanding of software development lifecycle, agile methodologies, and version control systems.
- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a diverse, global team environment.

- Passion for innovation and continuous improvement in technology and processes.

Join us to be part of a dynamic team where your skills and passion will contribute to transforming the financial industry through technology. Together, we build the digital future of finance.

title: Senior Elastic Search Engineer
description_raw:
THE POSITION:
A Senior Elastic Search Engineer is responsible for helping to architect, design, and implement key features and components in our AWS mission-critical platform by building micro-services and designing serverless applications in AWS to support our real estate data business.
From a technical perspective, this role requires working with many of the major AWS offerings including services, such as Lambda, Step Functions, Kinesis, Dynamo, Redshift, Scaling EC2 and CloudWatc h as examples. An understanding of Serverless design patterns and how and when to implement auto-scaling to ensure optimal throughput is essential.
Aside from the architecture and design, a Sr. Cloud Engineer must be an AWS cloud evangelist who loves teaching, mentoring and growing the talent around him/her. A team leader who enjoys making the team around him or her better. Leads by example.
Lastly, at times this role will require someone to lead a project and small team for the sake of building or enhancing a particular product or feature. This means working on a new project from initiation, design, architecture, planning, estimating, tracking and helping others on the team see the vision and develop in unison as a cohesive team that delivers incremental customer usable features on-time.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:
  • Help oversee architecture of real estate data pipeline.
  • Develop pipeline components that are scalable, reliable and efficient.
  • Continual oversight of the overall architecture ensuring the overall system doesn't erode or become overly complex as time passes and features are added.
  • Perform Project and Team lead duties as needed for new core features.
  • Code reviews, mentoring and coaching teammates to understand and implement AWS best practices in line with an "AWS Well-Architected Framework” .
  • Provide feedback and constructive critiques resulting in optimum performance and system design .
  • Continual tracking of component and overall system performance by applying and automating application and performance best practice testing, monitoring and reporting.
  • P rovide input and recommendations on managing costs within our AWS infrastructure at micro and macro levels.
JOB QUALIFICATIONS
  • We are seeking a Sr. Cloud Engineer that has familiarity with AWS Serverless architectures and has 4+ years of systems engineering/administration experience with Elastic Search. Candidate must have experience which demonstrates an understanding software design as it relates to Elasticsearch or OpenSearch deployments, indexing and querying. Estimated 50/50 split between general AWS and Elastic Search development.
  • 5+ years of professional coding experience with 3+ years in cloud services.
  • Experience in major AWS event-driven, compute and database solutions, including but not limited to:
    • Lambda, OpenSearch, Step Functions, SQS, Dynamo, Aurora and/or RDS (candidates with experience in both NoSQL and relational are preferred)
  • C#/.Net Framework experience preferred.
  • Understanding of developing microservices in AWS.
  • Understanding of CI/CD principles.
  • 4+ years of experience with Elastic Stack cluster architecture, design and deployment.
  • 2+ years of working with and understanding software design as it relates to Elasticsearch deployments or distributed computing / system architecture.
  • Reporting and alerting tools such as Grafana, Kibana, Cloudwatch, Quicksight etc.
Exciting Benefits we offer:
  • Market-leading Salary
  • Medical Coverage – Self & Dependents
  • Parents Medical Coverage
  • Provident Fund
  • Employee Performance-based bonuses
  • Home Internet Subsidy
  • Conveyance Allowance
  • Profit Sharing Plan [Tenured Employees Only]
  • Life Benefit

  • Company Provided Lunch/Dinner
  • Professional Development Budget
  • Recreational area for in-house games

description: Careem is a leading technology platform dedicated to building the Everything App for the greater Middle East, making everyday tasks such as ..
description_raw:
Careem is a leading technology platform dedicated to building the Everything App for the greater Middle East, making everyday tasks such as transportation, food and grocery delivery, and payment management seamless and accessible. Since its inception in 2012, Careem has empowered over 2.5 million Captains (drivers) to earn a livelihood, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and fostered a thriving ecosystem for the region’s top talent and entrepreneurs. Operating across 70+ cities in 10 countries—from Morocco to Pakistan—Careem is committed to solving complex regional challenges at scale while delivering exceptional experiences to Customers, Captains, and Merchants. Joining Careem means working with cutting-edge technology alongside a diverse and talented team spread across multiple geographies. Applicants will be considered for various roles within the company, ensuring alignment with their career goals and personal preferences. As a full-time team member, you will have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the region while advancing your professional growth.

Key Responsibilities
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and implement innovative solutions that enhance user experience and operational efficiency.
- Analyze complex problems and provide scalable, high-quality technical solutions that meet business requirements.
- Participate actively in code reviews, testing, and debugging to maintain high standards of software quality.
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of development processes and best practices within the team.
- Engage with stakeholders to gather requirements, provide updates, and ensure alignment throughout the project lifecycle.
- Mentor junior team members and foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment.

Required Qualifications
- Proven experience in software development with strong proficiency in relevant programming languages and frameworks.
- Solid understanding of software engineering principles, data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.
- Experience working in agile environments and familiarity with continuous integration and deployment practices.
- Ability to analyze and solve complex technical problems efficiently.
- Strong communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a multicultural, cross-functional team.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Experience working in fast-paced, high-growth technology companies or startups is highly desirable.
- Knowledge of the Middle Eastern market and regional challenges is a plus.
- Exposure to cloud platforms, microservices architecture, and scalable system design will be advantageous.
- Opportunity to work with a diverse and talented team across multiple countries.
- Access to continuous learning and development programs to support career growth.
- Chance to contribute to impactful projects that improve millions of lives in the region.

Careem offers a dynamic and inclusive work environment where innovation and collaboration are encouraged. By joining the team, you will be part of a mission-driven organization focused on simplifying and improving everyday life across the Middle East.

description: Systems Limited is seeking experienced Senior Developers with strong expertise in Java and AWS to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate..
description_raw:
Systems Limited is seeking experienced Senior Developers with strong expertise in Java and AWS to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidates will have between 5 to 10 years of hands-on experience in delivering high-quality software solutions. They should possess deep knowledge of their domain and demonstrate the ability to meet project requirements effectively while maintaining best practices in software development.

Key Responsibilities
- Design, develop, and maintain scalable Java-based applications leveraging AWS cloud services.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.
- Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications.
- Identify and correct bottlenecks and fix bugs to improve application performance.
- Participate in code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers.
- Stay updated with emerging technologies and apply them to improve development processes.
- Work closely with product owners and stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
- Maintain documentation related to system design, architecture, and code changes.

Required Qualifications
- 5 to 10 years of professional experience in Java development with a strong grasp of object-oriented programming concepts.
- Proven experience working with AWS services such as EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, and CloudFormation.
- Solid understanding of microservices architecture and RESTful API design.
- Experience with containerization technologies like Docker and orchestration tools such as Kubernetes is highly desirable.
- Proficient in database management and writing optimized SQL queries.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools to streamline deployment processes.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or as part of a team.
- Excellent communication skills to effectively collaborate with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Experience with Agile methodologies and working in Scrum teams.
- Knowledge of front-end technologies such as Angular, React, or Vue.js is a plus.
- Exposure to monitoring and logging tools like CloudWatch, ELK stack, or Prometheus.
- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge cloud technologies and large-scale enterprise projects.
- Supportive work environment encouraging continuous learning and professional growth.
- Competitive compensation package aligned with industry standards.

Candidates who meet the above criteria and are passionate about delivering robust and scalable software solutions are encouraged to apply. Join Systems Limited to be part of a forward-thinking organization that values innovation, quality, and teamwork.

description: We are seeking a motivated professional to contribute to the development of large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets aime..
description_raw:
We are seeking a motivated professional to contribute to the development of large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets aimed at enhancing LLM capabilities in solving realistic software engineering challenges. This role involves creating verifiable software engineering tasks derived from public repository histories using a synthetic approach combined with human-in-the-loop validation. The project focuses on expanding dataset coverage across various programming languages, difficulty levels, and task types to ensure comprehensive training and evaluation.

Key Responsibilities
- Design and develop verifiable software engineering tasks based on public code repositories.
- Implement synthetic data generation methods integrated with human-in-the-loop processes to ensure task quality and accuracy.
- Expand dataset diversity by incorporating multiple programming languages and varying levels of task complexity.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to refine dataset requirements and improve evaluation metrics.
- Analyze and validate dataset outputs to maintain high standards of reliability and relevance for LLM training.
- Document methodologies and contribute to continuous improvement of dataset creation workflows.

Required Qualifications
- Strong background in software engineering with hands-on experience in multiple programming languages.
- Familiarity with version control systems and public code repositories such as GitHub.
- Experience in dataset creation, data annotation, or synthetic data generation techniques.
- Understanding of machine learning concepts, particularly related to natural language processing or LLMs.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and communicate technical information effectively.
- Detail-oriented mindset with a focus on data quality and verifiability.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Experience working with human-in-the-loop systems or crowdsourcing platforms for data validation.
- Knowledge of software engineering education or assessment methodologies.
- Prior involvement in research or projects related to LLM training or evaluation.
- Opportunities for professional growth within an innovative AI research environment.
- Exposure to cutting-edge developments in AI and software engineering intersection.

This position offers the chance to contribute to pioneering work at the intersection of artificial intelligence and software engineering, helping to build datasets that enable LLMs to better understand and solve real-world coding problems.

description_html:
We are seeking a motivated professional to contribute to the development of large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets aimed at enhancing LLM capabilities in solving realistic software engineering challenges. This role involves creating verifiable software engineering tasks derived from public repository histories using a synthetic approach combined with human-in-the-loop validation. The project focuses on expanding dataset coverage across various programming languages, difficulty levels, and task types to ensure comprehensive training and evaluation.

Key Responsibilities
- Design and develop verifiable software engineering tasks based on public code repositories.
- Implement synthetic data generation methods integrated with human-in-the-loop processes to ensure task quality and accuracy.
- Expand dataset diversity by incorporating multiple programming languages and varying levels of task complexity.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to refine dataset requirements and improve evaluation metrics.
- Analyze and validate dataset outputs to maintain high standards of reliability and relevance for LLM training.
- Document methodologies and contribute to continuous improvement of dataset creation workflows.

Required Qualifications
- Strong background in software engineering with hands-on experience in multiple programming languages.
- Familiarity with version control systems and public code repositories such as GitHub.
- Experience in dataset creation, data annotation, or synthetic data generation techniques.
- Understanding of machine learning concepts, particularly related to natural language processing or LLMs.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and communicate technical information effectively.
- Detail-oriented mindset with a focus on data quality and verifiability.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Experience working with human-in-the-loop systems or crowdsourcing platforms for data validation.
- Knowledge of software engineering education or assessment methodologies.
- Prior involvement in research or projects related to LLM training or evaluation.
- Opportunities for professional growth within an innovative AI research environment.
- Exposure to cutting-edge developments in AI and software engineering intersection.

This position offers the chance to contribute to pioneering work at the intersection of artificial intelligence and software engineering, helping to build datasets that enable LLMs to better understand and solve real-world coding problems.

description_raw:
We are seeking an Associate Software Engineer with expertise in C++ to join our dynamic development team. This position is ideal for fresh graduates or professionals in the early stages of their careers who possess a strong passion for programming and problem-solving. The role involves contributing to software development projects within the Exploration & Production (E&P) industry, working collaboratively in an agile environment that follows Microsoft coding standards.

Key Responsibilities
- Develop and maintain software applications tailored for the E&P sector.
- Collaborate effectively within an agile team to design, code, test, and deploy software solutions.
- Adhere to Microsoft coding standards and best practices to ensure high-quality and maintainable code.
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement of development processes.
- Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and issues in a timely manner.
- Document software designs, processes, and updates clearly for team reference.

Required Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- Proficiency in C++ programming language with a solid understanding of object-oriented principles.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
- Familiarity with agile software development methodologies.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and communicate effectively.
- Basic understanding of software development lifecycle and version control systems.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Internship or project experience related to software development in the E&P or similar industries.
- Knowledge of Microsoft coding standards and development tools.
- Exposure to additional programming languages or frameworks is a plus.
- Opportunity to grow professionally within a supportive and innovative team.
- Gain hands-on experience working on real-world applications impacting the energy sector.

This role offers a valuable opportunity for early-career professionals to develop their technical skills and contribute meaningfully to software solutions in a specialized industry. Candidates who are eager to learn and grow in a collaborative setting will find this position rewarding.

description: ICIL Technologies is a forward-thinking company at the forefront of automation and artificial intelligence, dedicated to transforming how bu..
description_raw:
ICIL Technologies is a forward-thinking company at the forefront of automation and artificial intelligence, dedicated to transforming how businesses function in today’s digital landscape. With a strong emphasis on innovation and client-centric solutions, ICIL focuses on simplifying complex business processes while delivering significant strategic advantages. Central to its product suite is BOTeye, a cutting-edge platform that integrates Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Agentic Automation, and AI capabilities. This platform empowers organizations to automate not only routine, rule-based tasks but also sophisticated decision-making processes, advancing beyond conventional automation methods.

Key Responsibilities
- Develop, implement, and maintain automation solutions using BOTeye and related technologies to enhance operational efficiency.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to analyze business processes and identify automation opportunities.
- Design and execute test cases to ensure the quality and reliability of automation workflows.
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to automation tools and processes in a timely manner.
- Document automation processes, configurations, and updates to maintain clear records for future reference.
- Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in RPA, AI, and automation technologies to continuously improve solutions.
- Provide training and support to end-users and stakeholders to facilitate smooth adoption of automation tools.

Required Qualifications
- Proven experience in Robotic Process Automation (RPA) development and deployment, preferably with hands-on expertise in BOTeye or similar platforms.
- Strong understanding of automation frameworks, scripting languages, and workflow design.
- Ability to analyze complex business processes and translate them into effective automation solutions.
- Excellent problem-solving skills with a detail-oriented approach to troubleshooting automation issues.
- Effective communication skills to work collaboratively with technical and non-technical teams.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits
- Experience with AI-driven automation and agentic automation technologies is highly desirable.
- Familiarity with software testing methodologies and quality assurance practices.
- Exposure to cloud platforms and integration of automation solutions within cloud environments.
- Opportunity to work in a dynamic, innovation-driven environment focused on cutting-edge automation technologies.
- Access to continuous learning and professional development programs to enhance technical skills.
- Collaborative culture that values creativity, initiative, and client-focused solutions.

This role offers a unique chance to contribute to the evolution of automation technology within a company that values innovation and strategic impact. Candidates passionate about leveraging AI and automation to solve complex business challenges will find this position rewarding and growth-oriented.

description: TCP is seeking motivated professionals to join our team and contribute to delivering innovative workforce management solutions. With over 30..
description_raw:
TCP is seeking motivated professionals to join our team and contribute to delivering innovative workforce management solutions. With over 30 years of experience, TCP provides flexible, mobile timekeeping and employee management technology trusted by tens of thousands of customers across public and private sectors. Our solutions support complex timekeeping, scheduling, and leave management needs, backed by personalized service. As we continue to grow, we invite you to be part of a forward-thinking company dedicated to helping organizations engage their people effectively. Please note that TCP is committed to diversity and inclusion; however, we are unable to sponsor visas for this position.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop, implement, and maintain workforce management software solutions that meet client requirements.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including sales, support, and product development to ensure seamless delivery of services.
- Provide technical expertise and support during the sales process, including product demonstrations and responding to client inquiries.
- Troubleshoot and resolve software issues, ensuring timely and effective solutions to maintain customer satisfaction.
- Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance product functionality and user experience.
- Document technical specifications, processes, and procedures to support internal knowledge sharing and client training.
- Stay current with industry trends and emerging technologies to contribute innovative ideas and maintain competitive advantage.

Required Qualifications

- Proven experience in software development or technical roles within workforce management or related industries.
- Strong understanding of timekeeping, employee scheduling, and leave management systems.
- Proficiency in relevant programming languages and software development tools.
- Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.
- Effective communication skills to interact with clients and internal teams.
- Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
- Commitment to delivering high-quality solutions and exceptional customer service.

Preferred Qualifications and Benefits

- Experience working with cloud-based workforce management platforms.
- Familiarity with integration of third-party systems and APIs.
- Knowledge of compliance and labor laws related to timekeeping and employee management.
- TCP offers a dynamic work environment with opportunities for professional growth.
- Access to cutting-edge technology and resources to support your career development.
- A culture that values diversity, inclusion, and teamwork.

Join TCP and contribute to shaping the future of workforce management technology. We look forward to welcoming talented individuals who are passionate about making a difference in how organizations manage their most valuable asset—their people.
